description: Manual overrides for auto-generated variant groups. 'split' prevents auto-grouping; 'merge' forces grouping.

overrides.reason: Intelligence community vs Counterintelligence — different concepts despite shared LCSH URI
Private sector vs Public sector — opposites, not variants
Developing countries vs Least Developed Countries — related but distinct categories
Import vs Export — opposites, not variants
Fiscal vs Tax evasion — different concepts despite shared LCSH URI
Economic relations vs New international economic order — different concepts
Mining vs Mine — different meanings (extraction vs explosive device)
Foreign policy vs International relations — different concepts
Disaster relief vs Disaster — different scope
